trait.name: Hot Blooded
trait.effect: If you don't attack during your turn, gain 3 vigor, or 3d3 if you're in crisis. While at maximum vigor, you are unstoppable, and effects cannot prevent you from attacking.

basicAttack.name: Furor
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
On hit 2 vigor. If you or your target is in crisis, deals damage [+] and double vigor gain.

limitBreak.name: God Waster
limitBreak.effect:
Sever Divinity and cut through the threads of possibility. Pour all your rage into one blow and topple the Gods.
Attack: [Vigor] damage. Hit: +2d6.
Area effect: [Vigor] damage.
Heavy 4d3 vigor before the attack and pushes 4 on hit.
Effect burn out and lose all your vigor. You cannot gain vigor for the rest of combat.
If you miss this attack, ignore its last effect and refund 2 resolve. You can limit break again this combat.

keywords.name: Heavy
keywords.description: Use a heavier version of an ability. If you do, you are then unable to attack or use a heavy ability until the end of your next turn.
